<h1>Source code for booktx.context</h1><div class="highlight"><pre>
<span></span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Persistent translation context for a booktx project.</span>

<span class="sd">The translation contract in :mod:`booktx.models` preserves JSON structure,</span>
<span class="sd">record ids, placeholders, tags, and protected names. It does **not** preserve</span>
<span class="sd">translation *intent*: style, world terminology, and user-specific decisions.</span>

<span class="sd">This module owns the profile-local machine-readable translation context</span>
<span class="sd">(``translations/&lt;profile&gt;/context.json```) and the rendered human/agent view</span>
<span class="sd">(``translations/&lt;profile&gt;/context.md```) for normal profile workflows.</span>
<span class="sd">``context.json`` is authoritative; ``context.md`` is always regenerated from it.</span>

<span class="sd">The context is built deterministically and locally. It never calls an LLM, never</span>
<span class="sd">makes a network request, and never approves a glossary target on its own.</span>
<span class="sd">``ready=false`` means translation must not begin; the user (or an agent driving</span>
<span class="sd">the CLI on the user&#39;s behalf) must answer the required questions first.</span>
<span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">__future__</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">annotations</span>

<span class="kn">import</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">json</span>
<span class="kn">import</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">re</span>
<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">dataclasses</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">dataclass</span>
<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">pathlib</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">Path</span>
<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">typing</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">TYPE_CHECKING</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">Literal</span>

<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">pydantic</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">BaseModel</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">ConfigDict</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">Field</span>

<span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">TYPE_CHECKING</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.chapters</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">ChapterMap</span>
    <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.config</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">Project</span>

<span class="n">__all__</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;StyleProfile&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;GlossaryEntry&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;ContextQuestion&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;ChapterContext&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;TranslationContext&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;apply_answer_to_context&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;context_path&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;context_markdown_path&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;chapter_map_path&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;load_context&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;write_context&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;default_context&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;baseline_payload&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;baseline_sha256&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;chapter_notes_before_target&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;context_history_dir&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;context_history_views_dir&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;ensure_context_view_snapshot&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;render_context_markdown&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;write_context_markdown&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;parse_context_markdown_chapter_notes&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;chapter_contexts_equivalent&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>

    <span class="s2">&quot;upsert_chapter_context&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>

<div class="viewcode-block" id="StyleProfile">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.context.StyleProfile">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">class</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nc">StyleProfile</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">BaseModel</span><span class="p">):</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;User-approved style decisions for the translation.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="c1"># ``register`` is a real linguistic term but it shadows a reserved</span>
    <span class="c1"># pydantic attribute name, so the Python field uses ``register_level``</span>
    <span class="c1"># and serializes to the JSON key ``register``.</span>
    <span class="n">model_config</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ConfigDict</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">extra</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;forbid&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">populate_by_name</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">target_locale</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;de-DE&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">formality</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Literal</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;informal&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;neutral&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;formal&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;neutral&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">register_level</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">alias</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;register&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">prose_style</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">dialogue_style</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">sentence_policy</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;Prefer natural German prose; preserve meaning over word-for-word syntax.&quot;</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">punctuation_policy</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">units_policy</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;Keep source units unless the user says otherwise.&quot;</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="GlossaryEntry">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.context.GlossaryEntry">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">class</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nc">GlossaryEntry</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">BaseModel</span><span class="p">):</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;One glossary term with optional approved target and forbidden targets.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="n">model_config</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ConfigDict</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">extra</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;forbid&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">source</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">source_variants</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default_factory</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">target</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">target_variants</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default_factory</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">require_target</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span>
    <span class="n">forbidden_targets</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default_factory</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">category</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;term&quot;</span>  <span class="c1"># term, place, people, kinden, title, object, concept</span>
    <span class="n">status</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Literal</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;open&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;approved&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;rejected&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;open&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">notes</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">examples</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default_factory</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">case_sensitive</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span>
    <span class="n">enforce</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Literal</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;off&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;warn&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;error&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;warn&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">origin</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Literal</span><span class="p">[</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;core&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;seed&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;agent_review&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;user&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;legacy&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;imported&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;source_analysis&quot;</span>
    <span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;user&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">source_analysis_candidate_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="ContextQuestion">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.context.ContextQuestion">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">class</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nc">ContextQuestion</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">BaseModel</span><span class="p">):</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;One question that may need a user answer before translation can begin.</span>

<span class="sd">    ``required`` questions gate readiness: a context cannot be marked ready while</span>
<span class="sd">    any required question is still open.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="n">model_config</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ConfigDict</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">extra</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;forbid&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="nb">id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">topic</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">question</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">answer</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">status</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Literal</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;open&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;recommended&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;answered&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;skipped&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;open&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">required</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">True</span>
    <span class="n">origin</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Literal</span><span class="p">[</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;core&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;seed&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;agent_review&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;user&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;legacy&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;source_analysis&quot;</span>
    <span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;core&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">source_analysis_candidate_ids</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default_factory</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">recommendation</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">recommendation_reason</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">recommendation_source</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">answer_source</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Literal</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;user&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;imported&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;legacy&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;forced&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;agent&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">approved_by</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">approved_at</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span></div>

    <span class="n">ready_at</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">style</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">StyleProfile</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default_factory</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">StyleProfile</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">global_rules</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default_factory</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">glossary</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">GlossaryEntry</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default_factory</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">questions</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">ContextQuestion</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default_factory</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">chapter_contexts</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">ChapterContext</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default_factory</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">)</span></div>



<span class="nd">@dataclass</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">frozen</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">slots</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">)</span>
<span class="k">class</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nc">ContextViewSnapshot</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Immutable task-scoped context view metadata.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="n">context_view_sha256</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">baseline_ref</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">baseline_sha256</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">notes_scope</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">target_chapter_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">notes_through_chapter_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">note_chapter_ids</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span>
    <span class="n">context_path</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">context_md_path</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">created_at</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>


<span class="c1"># --- paths ------------------------------------------------------------------</span>


<div class="viewcode-block" id="context_path">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.context.context_path">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">context_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">Path</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Path to the authoritative context JSON for the selected translation scope.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">context_json_path</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">booktx_dir</span> <span class="o">/</span> <span class="s2">&quot;context.json&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="context_markdown_path">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.context.context_markdown_path">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">context_markdown_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">Path</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Path to the rendered context markdown for the selected translation scope.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">context_md_path</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">booktx_dir</span> <span class="o">/</span> <span class="s2">&quot;context.md&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="chapter_map_path">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.context.chapter_map_path">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">chapter_map_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">Path</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Path to ``.booktx/chapter-map.json`` (owned by :mod:`booktx.chapters`).&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_map_path</span></div>



<span class="c1"># --- IO ---------------------------------------------------------------------</span>


<div class="viewcode-block" id="load_context">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.context.load_context">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">load_context</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">TranslationContext</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Load the context, or return ``None`` if no context file exists.</span>

<span class="sd">    A corrupt context raises a :class:`ValueError` so the caller can surface it</span>
<span class="sd">    rather than silently dropping the user&#39;s decisions.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">path</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">context_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">path</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">is_file</span><span class="p">():</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">ctx</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">TranslationContext</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">model_validate_json</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">path</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">read_text</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;utf-8&quot;</span><span class="p">))</span>
    <span class="n">normalize_context_question_provenance</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">ctx</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">ctx</span></div>



<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">normalize_context_question_provenance</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">context</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">TranslationContext</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Mark old answered questions without provenance as legacy.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">q</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">context</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">questions</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">q</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">status</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;answered&quot;</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">q</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">answer</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">q</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">answer_source</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">q</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">answer_source</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;legacy&quot;</span>


<div class="viewcode-block" id="unresolved_required_questions">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.context.unresolved_required_questions">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">unresolved_required_questions</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">context</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">TranslationContext</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">ContextQuestion</span><span class="p">]:</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="p">[</span>
        <span class="n">q</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">q</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">context</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">questions</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">q</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">required</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">q</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">status</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;answered&quot;</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">q</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">answer</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">())</span>
    <span class="p">]</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="unapproved_required_questions">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.context.unapproved_required_questions">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">unapproved_required_questions</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">context</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">TranslationContext</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">ContextQuestion</span><span class="p">]:</span>
    <span class="n">normalize_context_question_provenance</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">context</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="p">[</span>
        <span class="n">q</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">q</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">context</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">questions</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">q</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">required</span>
        <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">q</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">status</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;answered&quot;</span>
        <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">q</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">answer_source</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="p">{</span><span class="s2">&quot;user&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;imported&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;legacy&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;forced&quot;</span><span class="p">}</span>
    <span class="p">]</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="next_question_id">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.context.next_question_id">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">next_question_id</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">context</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">TranslationContext</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">prefix</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;Q&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="n">max_seen</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">q</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">context</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">questions</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">q</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">startswith</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">prefix</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">q</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">prefix</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">:]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">isdigit</span><span class="p">():</span>
            <span class="n">max_seen</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">max</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">max_seen</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">q</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">prefix</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">:]))</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">prefix</span><span class="si">}{</span><span class="n">max_seen</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o">+</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="si">:</span><span class="s2">03d</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="write_context">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.context.write_context">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">write_context</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">context</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">TranslationContext</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Persist ``context`` to the resolved profile&#39;s ``context.json``.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.io_utils</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">write_json_text_atomic</span>

    <span class="n">write_json_text_atomic</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">context_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="n">context</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">model_dump_json</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">indent</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">2</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">by_alias</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">),</span>
    <span class="p">)</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="baseline_payload">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.context.baseline_payload">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">baseline_payload</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">context</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">TranslationContext</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">object</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Return the semantic baseline payload for version resolution.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">data</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">context</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">model_dump</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mode</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;json&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">by_alias</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">data</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">pop</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;chapter_contexts&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">data</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="baseline_sha256">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.context.baseline_sha256">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">baseline_sha256</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">context</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">TranslationContext</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Return the baseline hash excluding chronological chapter notes.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.versioning</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">canonical_json_sha256</span>

    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">canonical_json_sha256</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">baseline_payload</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">context</span><span class="p">))</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="context_history_dir">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.context.context_history_dir">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">context_history_dir</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">Path</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Return the history directory adjacent to the live context files.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">context_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">parent</span> <span class="o">/</span> <span class="s2">&quot;context-history&quot;</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="context_history_views_dir">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.context.context_history_views_dir">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">context_history_views_dir</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">Path</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Return the directory containing immutable context view snapshots.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">context_history_dir</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">/</span> <span class="s2">&quot;views&quot;</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="chapter_notes_before_target">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.context.chapter_notes_before_target">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">chapter_notes_before_target</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">chapter_map</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">ChapterMap</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">notes</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">ChapterContext</span><span class="p">],</span>
    <span class="n">target_chapter_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">ChapterContext</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Return prior chapter notes in chapter-map order for one target chapter.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">ordered_ids</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[</span><span class="n">chapter</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_id</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">chapter</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">chapter_map</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapters</span><span class="p">]</span>
    <span class="k">try</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">target_index</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ordered_ids</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">index</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">target_chapter_id</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">except</span> <span class="ne">ValueError</span> <span class="k">as</span> <span class="n">exc</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="ne">ValueError</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;unknown target chapter id: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">target_chapter_id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">exc</span>
    <span class="n">notes_by_id</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{</span><span class="n">note</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">note</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">note</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">notes</span><span class="p">}</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="p">[</span>
        <span class="n">notes_by_id</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">chapter_id</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">model_copy</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">deep</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">chapter_id</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">ordered_ids</span><span class="p">[:</span><span class="n">target_index</span><span class="p">]</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">chapter_id</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">notes_by_id</span>
    <span class="p">]</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="ensure_context_view_snapshot">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.context.ensure_context_view_snapshot">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">ensure_context_view_snapshot</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">project</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">baseline_ref</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">baseline_sha256</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">target_chapter_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">notes_scope</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;before_target_chapter&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">ContextViewSnapshot</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Compose and persist an immutable task context view snapshot.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.chapters</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">ensure_chapter_map</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">load_chapter_map</span>
    <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.config</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">stored_path</span>
    <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.io_utils</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">utc_timestamp</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">write_json_text_atomic</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">write_text_atomic</span>
    <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.versioning</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">canonical_json_sha256</span>

    <span class="n">context</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">load_context</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">context</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="ne">ValueError</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;translation context is missing&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">chapter_map</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">load_chapter_map</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">ensure_chapter_map</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">selected_notes</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">chapter_notes_before_target</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">chapter_map</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">context</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_contexts</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">target_chapter_id</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">view</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">context</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">model_copy</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">deep</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">view</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_contexts</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">selected_notes</span>
    <span class="n">view_payload</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">view</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">model_dump</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mode</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;json&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">by_alias</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">view_sha256</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">canonical_json_sha256</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">view_payload</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">snapshot_dir</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">context_history_views_dir</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">/</span> <span class="n">view_sha256</span>
    <span class="n">snapshot_dir</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">mkdir</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">parents</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">exist_ok</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">context_json_path</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">snapshot_dir</span> <span class="o">/</span> <span class="s2">&quot;context.json&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">context_md_path</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">snapshot_dir</span> <span class="o">/</span> <span class="s2">&quot;context.md&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">manifest_path</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">snapshot_dir</span> <span class="o">/</span> <span class="s2">&quot;manifest.json&quot;</span>

    <span class="n">context_json_text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">json</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">dumps</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">view_payload</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">indent</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">2</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">ensure_ascii</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">context_json_text</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">endswith</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\n</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="n">context_json_text</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\n</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">context_md_text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">render_context_markdown</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">view</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">context_rel</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">stored_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">context_json_path</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">context_md_rel</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">stored_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">context_md_path</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">note_ids</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[</span><span class="n">note</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_id</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">note</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">selected_notes</span><span class="p">]</span>
    <span class="n">notes_through</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">note_ids</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="o">-</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">note_ids</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="kc">None</span>

    <span class="n">expected_payload</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;version&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;context_view_sha256&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">view_sha256</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;baseline_ref&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">baseline_ref</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;baseline_sha256&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">baseline_sha256</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;notes_scope&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">notes_scope</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;target_chapter_id&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">target_chapter_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;notes_through_chapter_id&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">notes_through</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;note_chapter_ids&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">note_ids</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;context_path&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">context_rel</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;context_md_path&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">context_md_rel</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">}</span>

    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">context_json_path</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">is_file</span><span class="p">():</span>
        <span class="n">existing</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">context_json_path</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">read_text</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;utf-8&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">existing</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="n">context_json_text</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="ne">ValueError</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;context snapshot collision for </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">view_sha256</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">: context.json differs&quot;</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">write_json_text_atomic</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">context_json_path</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">context_json_text</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">context_md_path</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">is_file</span><span class="p">():</span>
        <span class="n">existing</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">context_md_path</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">read_text</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;utf-8&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">existing</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="n">context_md_text</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="ne">ValueError</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;context snapshot collision for </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">view_sha256</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">: context.md differs&quot;</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">write_text_atomic</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">context_md_path</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">context_md_text</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">created_at</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">utc_timestamp</span><span class="p">()</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">manifest_path</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">is_file</span><span class="p">():</span>
        <span class="n">existing_manifest</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">json</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">loads</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">manifest_path</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">read_text</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;utf-8&quot;</span><span class="p">))</span>
        <span class="n">comparable_keys</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;version&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;context_view_sha256&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;baseline_sha256&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;notes_scope&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;notes_through_chapter_id&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;note_chapter_ids&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;context_path&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;context_md_path&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">comparable</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{</span><span class="n">k</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">existing_manifest</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">k</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">k</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">comparable_keys</span><span class="p">}</span>
        <span class="n">expected_comparable</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{</span><span class="n">k</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">expected_payload</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">k</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">k</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">comparable_keys</span><span class="p">}</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">comparable</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="n">expected_comparable</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="ne">ValueError</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;context snapshot collision for </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">view_sha256</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">: manifest differs&quot;</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">created_at</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">existing_manifest</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;created_at&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">created_at</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">manifest_payload</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{</span>
            <span class="o">**</span><span class="n">expected_payload</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;created_at&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">created_at</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">}</span>
        <span class="n">write_json_text_atomic</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">manifest_path</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">json</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">dumps</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">manifest_payload</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">indent</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">2</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">ensure_ascii</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">ContextViewSnapshot</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">context_view_sha256</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">view_sha256</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">baseline_ref</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">baseline_ref</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">baseline_sha256</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">baseline_sha256</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">notes_scope</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">notes_scope</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">target_chapter_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">target_chapter_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">notes_through_chapter_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">notes_through</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">note_chapter_ids</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">note_ids</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">context_path</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">context_rel</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">context_md_path</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">context_md_rel</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">created_at</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">created_at</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span></div>



<span class="c1"># --- seed questionnaire and glossary ----------------------------------------</span>


<div class="viewcode-block" id="seed_questions">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.context.seed_questions">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">seed_questions</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">ContextQuestion</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Generic initial questionnaire for any translation project.</span>

<span class="sd">    The questions marked ``required=True`` gate ``ready``. Typography and units</span>
<span class="sd">    are left optional: they affect style but a missing answer does not block the</span>
<span class="sd">    terminology safety that the context gate exists to provide.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">items</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">tuple</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">bool</span><span class="p">]]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[</span>
        <span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;Q001&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;target_locale&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;Target language and locale (e.g. German Germany de-DE, &quot;</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;Austrian German de-AT, Swiss German de-CH).&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;Q002&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;overall_style&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;Overall style: literal, balanced, or fluent literary?&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;Q003&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;register&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;Register: neutral, elevated, gritty, archaic, YA-like, etc.?&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;Q004&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;dialogue_style&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;Dialogue style: modern/natural vs. stylized; how to handle &quot;</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;insults, slang, and contractions?&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;Q005&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;names&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;Which names/titles/place names must remain unchanged?&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;Q006&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;world_terms&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;Invented world terms: translate, partially translate, or keep &quot;</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;source form?&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;Q010&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;typography&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;Typography: quotation marks, em dashes, italics, &quot;</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;placeholders, chapter titles.&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;Q011&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;units&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;Units: preserve original or convert to target locale conventions?&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;Q012&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;glossary_enforcement&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;Glossary enforcement: should forbidden terms be validation &quot;</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;warnings or errors?&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">),</span>
    <span class="p">]</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="p">[</span>
        <span class="n">ContextQuestion</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="nb">id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">qid</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">topic</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">topic</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">question</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">required</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">required</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">origin</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;core&quot;</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">qid</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">topic</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">required</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">items</span>
    <span class="p">]</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="seed_glossary">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.context.seed_glossary">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">seed_glossary</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">GlossaryEntry</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Generic glossary seeds (empty by default).</span>

<span class="sd">    Book-specific seeds can be loaded via the ``--seed`` option on</span>
<span class="sd">    ``booktx context init``. The Shadows-of-Apt template is available as</span>
<span class="sd">    ``--seed shadows-of-apt``.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="p">[]</span></div>



<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">load_seed_template</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">name</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">tuple</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">ContextQuestion</span><span class="p">],</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">GlossaryEntry</span><span class="p">]]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Load book-specific seeds from a packaged template.</span>

<span class="sd">    Returns ``(extra_questions, glossary_entries)`` to merge into the default</span>
<span class="sd">    context. Raises ``FileNotFoundError`` for unknown template names.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="kn">import</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">json</span>
    <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">pathlib</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">Path</span>

    <span class="n">template_dir</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="vm">__file__</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">parent</span> <span class="o">/</span> <span class="s2">&quot;templates&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">template_path</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">normalized</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">name</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">()</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">candidate</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="p">[</span>
        <span class="n">normalized</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">normalized</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">replace</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;-&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;_&quot;</span><span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="n">normalized</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">replace</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;_&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;-&quot;</span><span class="p">),</span>
    <span class="p">]:</span>
        <span class="n">path</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">template_dir</span> <span class="o">/</span> <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">candidate</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">.json&quot;</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">path</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">is_file</span><span class="p">():</span>
            <span class="n">template_path</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">path</span>
            <span class="k">break</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">template_path</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="ne">FileNotFoundError</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;unknown seed template: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">name</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">data</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">json</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">loads</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">template_path</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">read_text</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;utf-8&quot;</span><span class="p">))</span>
    <span class="n">questions</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[</span>
        <span class="n">ContextQuestion</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="nb">id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">q</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;id&quot;</span><span class="p">],</span>
            <span class="n">topic</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">q</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;topic&quot;</span><span class="p">],</span>
            <span class="n">question</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">q</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;question&quot;</span><span class="p">],</span>
            <span class="n">required</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">q</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;required&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">),</span>
            <span class="n">origin</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">q</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;origin&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;seed&quot;</span><span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">q</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">data</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;questions&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[])</span>
    <span class="p">]</span>
    <span class="n">glossary</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[</span>
        <span class="n">GlossaryEntry</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">source</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">g</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;source&quot;</span><span class="p">],</span>
            <span class="n">target</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">g</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;target&quot;</span><span class="p">),</span>
            <span class="n">forbidden_targets</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">g</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;forbidden_targets&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[]),</span>
            <span class="n">category</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">g</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;category&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">),</span>
            <span class="n">status</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">g</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;status&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;open&quot;</span><span class="p">),</span>
            <span class="n">notes</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">g</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;notes&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">),</span>
            <span class="n">enforce</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">g</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;enforce&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;warn&quot;</span><span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">g</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">data</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;glossary&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[])</span>
    <span class="p">]</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">questions</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">glossary</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">available_seed_templates</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Return names of packaged seed templates.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">pathlib</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">Path</span>

    <span class="n">template_dir</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="vm">__file__</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">parent</span> <span class="o">/</span> <span class="s2">&quot;templates&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">template_dir</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">is_dir</span><span class="p">():</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="nb">sorted</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">p</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">stem</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">p</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">template_dir</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">glob</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;*.json&quot;</span><span class="p">))</span>


<div class="viewcode-block" id="default_context">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.context.default_context">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">default_context</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">source_sha256</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">TranslationContext</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Build a not-ready context pre-filled from the project config.</span>

<span class="sd">    Source/target languages and the source digest are taken from the project.</span>
<span class="sd">    Style and glossary start empty/seeded; required questions are open.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">TranslationContext</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">source_language</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">config</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_language</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">target_language</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">config</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">target_language</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">source_sha256</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">source_sha256</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">ready</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">style</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">StyleProfile</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">target_locale</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">config</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">target_language</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="s2">&quot;de-DE&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="n">glossary</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">seed_glossary</span><span class="p">(),</span>
        <span class="n">questions</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">seed_questions</span><span class="p">(),</span>
    <span class="p">)</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="apply_answer_to_context">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.context.apply_answer_to_context">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">apply_answer_to_context</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">context</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">TranslationContext</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">question_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="n">value</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">()</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">value</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">question_id</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;Q001&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">context</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">style</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">target_locale</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">value</span>
    <span class="k">elif</span> <span class="n">question_id</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;Q002&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
