        <span class="n">context</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">style</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">prose_style</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">value</span>
    <span class="k">elif</span> <span class="n">question_id</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;Q003&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">context</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">style</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">register_level</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">value</span>
    <span class="k">elif</span> <span class="n">question_id</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;Q004&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">context</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">style</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">dialogue_style</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">value</span>
    <span class="k">elif</span> <span class="n">question_id</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;Q010&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">context</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">style</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">punctuation_policy</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">value</span>
    <span class="k">elif</span> <span class="n">question_id</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;Q011&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">context</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">style</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">units_policy</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">value</span></div>



<span class="c1"># --- markdown rendering ------------------------------------------------------</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_escape_cell</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">replace</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;|&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\\</span><span class="s2">|&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">replace</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\n</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot; &quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_status_label</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">ready</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="s2">&quot;READY&quot;</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">ready</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="s2">&quot;NOT READY&quot;</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_render_header</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">context</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">TranslationContext</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]:</span>
    <span class="n">style</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">context</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">style</span>
    <span class="n">lines</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;# booktx translation context&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Status: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">_status_label</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">context</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ready</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Source language: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">context</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_language</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Target language: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">context</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">target_language</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">]</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">style</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">target_locale</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">lines</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Target locale: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">style</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">target_locale</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">context</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_title</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">lines</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Source title: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">context</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_title</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">context</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_author</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">lines</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Source author: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">context</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_author</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">lines</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">lines</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_render_effective_source_truth_section</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]:</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="p">[</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;## Source of truth&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;- This effective view is a prompt surface derived from context.json.&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;- Structured style, glossary/name policy, and global rules are active policy.&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;- Setup questions and chapter decisions are provenance unless promoted &quot;</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;with context commands.&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">]</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_render_style_section</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">style</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">StyleProfile</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]:</span>
    <span class="n">dialogue_default</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;natural dialogue, preserve character voice&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">lines</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;## Style&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;- Formality: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">style</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">formality</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;- Prose style: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">style</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">prose_style</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="ow">or</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s1">&#39;fluent literary, not word-for-word&#39;</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;- Dialogue: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">style</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">dialogue_style</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="ow">or</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">dialogue_default</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;- Sentence policy: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">style</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">sentence_policy</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">]</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">style</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">register_level</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">lines</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;- Register: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">style</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">register_level</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">style</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">punctuation_policy</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">lines</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;- Punctuation: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">style</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">punctuation_policy</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">lines</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;- Units: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">style</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">units_policy</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">lines</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">lines</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_render_glossary_section</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">glossary</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">GlossaryEntry</span><span class="p">])</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]:</span>
    <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.glossary_match</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">entry_is_binding</span>

    <span class="n">binding</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[</span><span class="n">e</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">e</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">glossary</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">entry_is_binding</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">e</span><span class="p">)]</span>
    <span class="n">disabled</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[</span>
        <span class="n">e</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">e</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">glossary</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">e</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">enforce</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;off&quot;</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">e</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">require_target</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">e</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">forbidden_targets</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="p">]</span>
    <span class="n">advisory</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[</span><span class="n">e</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">e</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">glossary</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">e</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">binding</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">e</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">disabled</span><span class="p">]</span>

    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_forbidden</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">entry</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">GlossaryEntry</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="s2">&quot;; &quot;</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">join</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">entry</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">forbidden_targets</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">entry</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">forbidden_targets</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_approved</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">entry</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">GlossaryEntry</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">entry</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">target</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">entry</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">target</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&lt;open&gt;&quot;</span>

    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_notes</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">entry</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">GlossaryEntry</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">prefix</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;[source-analysis recommendation; not approved] &quot;</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">entry</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">origin</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;source_analysis&quot;</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">entry</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">status</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;open&quot;</span>
            <span class="k">else</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">prefix</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="n">entry</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">notes</span>

    <span class="n">lines</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="n">lines</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="p">[</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;## Binding glossary&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;| Source | Approved target | Required | Forbidden targets |&quot;</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot; Enforcement | Status | Notes |&quot;</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">]</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">binding</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">entry</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">binding</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">lines</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;| </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">_escape_cell</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">entry</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> | </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">_escape_cell</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">_approved</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">entry</span><span class="p">))</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> |&quot;</span>
                <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot; </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">entry</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">require_target</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">lower</span><span class="p">()</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> |&quot;</span>
                <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot; </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">_escape_cell</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">_forbidden</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">entry</span><span class="p">))</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> |&quot;</span>
                <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot; </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">entry</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">enforce</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> | </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">entry</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">status</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> |&quot;</span>
                <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot; </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">_escape_cell</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">_notes</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">entry</span><span class="p">))</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> |&quot;</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">lines</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;| _(no glossary entries yet; no binding glossary entries)_ | | | | | | |&quot;</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">lines</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="p">[</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;## Advisory glossary (not validation-binding)&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;| Source | Approved target | Validation | Enforcement | Status | Notes |&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;|---|---|---|---|---|---|&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">]</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">advisory</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">entry</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">advisory</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">lines</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;| </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">_escape_cell</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">entry</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> | </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">_escape_cell</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">_approved</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">entry</span><span class="p">))</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> |&quot;</span>
                <span class="s2">&quot; advisory only, approved target not required |&quot;</span>
                <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot; </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">entry</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">enforce</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> | </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">entry</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">status</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> |&quot;</span>
                <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot; </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">_escape_cell</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">_notes</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">entry</span><span class="p">))</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> |&quot;</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">lines</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;| _(no advisory glossary entries)_ | | | | | |&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">lines</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="p">[</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;Advisory entries are guidance only. Validation failures only occur&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;if converted with `context mandate-term` or `add-term --require-target`,&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;or if forbidden targets are configured.&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">]</span>
    <span class="n">lines</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="p">[</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;## Disabled glossary rules&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;| Source | Approved target | Required | Forbidden targets | Status | Notes |&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;|---|---|---|---|---|---|&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">]</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">disabled</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">entry</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">disabled</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">lines</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;| </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">_escape_cell</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">entry</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> | </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">_escape_cell</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">_approved</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">entry</span><span class="p">))</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> |&quot;</span>
                <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot; </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">entry</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">require_target</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">lower</span><span class="p">()</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> |&quot;</span>
                <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot; </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">_escape_cell</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">_forbidden</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">entry</span><span class="p">))</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> |&quot;</span>
                <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot; </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">entry</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">status</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> | </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">_escape_cell</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">_notes</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">entry</span><span class="p">))</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> |&quot;</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">lines</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;| _(no disabled glossary rules)_ | | | | | |&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">lines</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">lines</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_render_questions_section</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">questions</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">ContextQuestion</span><span class="p">])</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]:</span>
    <span class="n">lines</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="n">open_q</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[</span><span class="n">q</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">q</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">questions</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">q</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">status</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;open&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">open_q</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">lines</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;## Open questions&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">q</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">open_q</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">lines</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;- </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">q</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">q</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">question</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">lines</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">recommended</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[</span><span class="n">q</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">q</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">questions</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">q</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">status</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;recommended&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">recommended</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">lines</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;## Recommended questions&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">q</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">recommended</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">rec</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">q</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">recommendation</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
            <span class="n">origin</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="s2">&quot; [source-analysis recommendation; not approved]&quot;</span>
                <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">q</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">origin</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;source_analysis&quot;</span>
                <span class="k">else</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">reason</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot; Reason: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">q</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">recommendation_reason</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">q</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">recommendation_reason</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">lines</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;- </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">q</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">q</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">question</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> -&gt; </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">rec</span><span class="si">}{</span><span class="n">origin</span><span class="si">}{</span><span class="n">reason</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">lines</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">answered</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[</span><span class="n">q</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">q</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">questions</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">q</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">status</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;answered&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">answered</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">lines</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;## Answered questions&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">q</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">answered</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">ans</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">q</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">answer</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
            <span class="n">source</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot; [</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">q</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">answer_source</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">]&quot;</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">q</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">answer_source</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
            <span class="n">lines</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;- </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">q</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">q</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">question</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> -&gt; </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">ans</span><span class="si">}{</span><span class="n">source</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">lines</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">lines</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_render_chapter_notes_section</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">chapters</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">ChapterContext</span><span class="p">])</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]:</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">chapters</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="n">lines</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;## Chapter notes&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">ch</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">chapters</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">title</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot; </span><span class="se">\u2014</span><span class="s2"> </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">ch</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">title</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">ch</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">title</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
        <span class="n">lines</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;### </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">ch</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_id</span><span class="si">}{</span><span class="n">title</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">ch</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_summary</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">lines</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;- Source summary: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">ch</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_summary</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">ch</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">translation_summary</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">lines</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;- Translation summary: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">ch</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">translation_summary</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">issue</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">ch</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">open_issues</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">lines</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;- Open issue: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">issue</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">dec</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">ch</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">decisions_added</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">lines</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;- Decision: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">dec</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">lines</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">lines</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_render_global_rules_section</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">rules</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">])</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]:</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">rules</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="n">lines</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;## Global rules&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">rule</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">rules</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">lines</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;- </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">rule</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">lines</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">lines</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_render_agent_rules_section</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]:</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="p">[</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;## Rules for agents&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;- Read this file before translating every new chapter.&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;- Glossary rules override dictionary translations.&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;- Do not use forbidden target terms.&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;- Context answers are user policy, not agent policy.&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;- Do not answer initial context questions yourself; ask the user to approve&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;  or edit recommendations.&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;- Update chapter notes after completing a chapter.&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">]</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_render_effective_chapter_memory</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">chapters</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">ChapterContext</span><span class="p">])</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]:</span>
    <span class="n">lines</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;## Chapter memory&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;Chapter memory is continuity context only. It is not terminology or &quot;</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;name policy.&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">]</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">chapters</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">lines</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;_(no chapter memory yet)_&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">lines</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">lines</span>
    <span class="n">has_decisions</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">ch</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">chapters</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">title</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot; — </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">ch</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">title</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">ch</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">title</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
        <span class="n">lines</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;### </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">ch</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_id</span><span class="si">}{</span><span class="n">title</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">ch</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_summary</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">lines</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;- Source summary: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">ch</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_summary</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">ch</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">translation_summary</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">lines</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;- Translation summary: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">ch</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">translation_summary</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">issue</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">ch</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">open_issues</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">lines</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;- Open issue: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">issue</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">ch</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">decisions_added</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">has_decisions</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">True</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">has_decisions</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">lines</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">lines</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;Note: chapter decisions exist as provenance. Review candidates&quot;</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot; with `booktx context doctor`.&quot;</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">lines</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">lines</span>


<div class="viewcode-block" id="render_context_markdown">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.context.render_context_markdown">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">render_context_markdown</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">context</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">TranslationContext</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">view</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Literal</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;full&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;effective&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;provenance&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;full&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Render a short, agent-readable markdown view of ``context``.</span>

<span class="sd">    The markdown is always derived from ``context``; it is never authoritative.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">lines</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="n">lines</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">extend</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">_render_header</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">context</span><span class="p">))</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">view</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;effective&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">lines</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">extend</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">_render_effective_source_truth_section</span><span class="p">())</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">view</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;provenance&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">lines</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">extend</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">_render_questions_section</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">context</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">questions</span><span class="p">))</span>
        <span class="n">lines</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">extend</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">_render_chapter_notes_section</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">context</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_contexts</span><span class="p">))</span>
        <span class="n">lines</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">extend</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">_render_agent_rules_section</span><span class="p">())</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\n</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">join</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">lines</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">lines</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">extend</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">_render_style_section</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">context</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">style</span><span class="p">))</span>
    <span class="n">lines</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">extend</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">_render_glossary_section</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">context</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">glossary</span><span class="p">))</span>
    <span class="n">lines</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">extend</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">_render_global_rules_section</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">context</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">global_rules</span><span class="p">))</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">view</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;effective&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">lines</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">extend</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">_render_effective_chapter_memory</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">context</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_contexts</span><span class="p">))</span>
    <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">lines</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">extend</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">_render_questions_section</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">context</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">questions</span><span class="p">))</span>
        <span class="n">lines</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">extend</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">_render_chapter_notes_section</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">context</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_contexts</span><span class="p">))</span>
    <span class="n">lines</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">extend</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">_render_agent_rules_section</span><span class="p">())</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\n</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">join</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">lines</span><span class="p">)</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="write_context_markdown">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.context.write_context_markdown">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">write_context_markdown</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">context</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">TranslationContext</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Render ``context`` to the resolved profile&#39;s ``context.md``.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.io_utils</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">write_text_atomic</span>

    <span class="n">write_text_atomic</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">context_markdown_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="n">render_context_markdown</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">context</span><span class="p">),</span>
    <span class="p">)</span></div>



<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_read_text_normalized</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">path</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Path</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Read UTF-8 text and normalize all line endings to LF.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">path</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">read_bytes</span><span class="p">()</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">decode</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;utf-8&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">replace</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\r\n</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\n</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">replace</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\r</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\n</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>


<span class="c1"># --- chapter note parsing and markdown drift --------------------------------</span>


<span class="n">_CHAPTER_NOTE_HEADING_RE</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">re</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">compile</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="sa">r</span><span class="s2">&quot;^(?P&lt;id&gt;\S+)(?:\s+(?P&lt;sep&gt;[\u2014\u2013-])\s+(?P&lt;title&gt;.+))?$&quot;</span>
<span class="p">)</span>

<span class="n">_CHAPTER_NOTE_BULLETS</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">tuple</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">tuple</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">],</span> <span class="o">...</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;- Source summary: &quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;source_summary&quot;</span><span class="p">),</span>
    <span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;- Translation summary: &quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;translation_summary&quot;</span><span class="p">),</span>
    <span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;- Decision: &quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;decisions_added&quot;</span><span class="p">),</span>
    <span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;- Open issue: &quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;open_issues&quot;</span><span class="p">),</span>
<span class="p">)</span>

<span class="n">_CHAPTER_NOTES_HEADING</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;## Chapter notes&quot;</span>


<div class="viewcode-block" id="parse_context_markdown_chapter_notes">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.context.parse_context_markdown_chapter_notes">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">parse_context_markdown_chapter_notes</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">markdown</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">ChapterContext</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Parse the rendered ``## Chapter notes`` section from ``context.md``.</span>

<span class="sd">    Only the ``## Chapter notes`` section is parsed; parsing stops at the next</span>
<span class="sd">    level-2 heading. Chapter headings must match the rendered shape</span>
<span class="sd">    ``### 0006`` or ``### 0006 &lt;separator&gt; Title`` where ``&lt;separator&gt;`` is an</span>
<span class="sd">    em dash, en dash, or ASCII hyphen. The four bullet prefixes</span>
<span class="sd">    ``- Source summary:``, ``- Translation summary:``, ``- Decision:``, and</span>
<span class="sd">    ``- Open issue:`` are parsed exactly. Unknown non-empty content inside a</span>
<span class="sd">    chapter note raises :class:`ValueError`; nothing is silently mapped to</span>
<span class="sd">    open issues.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">lines</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">markdown</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">split</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\n</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">start</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">i</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">line</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="nb">enumerate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">lines</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">line</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">_CHAPTER_NOTES_HEADING</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">start</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">i</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="mi">1</span>
            <span class="k">break</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">start</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="n">end</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">lines</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">j</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="nb">range</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">start</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">lines</span><span class="p">)):</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">lines</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">j</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">startswith</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;## &quot;</span><span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="n">end</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">j</span>
            <span class="k">break</span>
    <span class="n">chapters</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">ChapterContext</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="n">current</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">ChapterContext</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">raw</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">lines</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">start</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="n">end</span><span class="p">]:</span>
        <span class="n">line</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">raw</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">rstrip</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\r</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">line</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">():</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">line</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">startswith</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;### &quot;</span><span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="n">match</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_CHAPTER_NOTE_HEADING_RE</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">match</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">line</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">4</span><span class="p">:])</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">match</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="ne">ValueError</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;unparsable chapter note heading: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">line</span><span class="si">!r}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">current</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ChapterContext</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">chapter_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">match</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">group</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;id&quot;</span><span class="p">),</span>
                <span class="n">title</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">match</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">group</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;title&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">(),</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">chapters</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">current</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">current</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="ne">ValueError</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;unexpected content before first chapter note: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">line</span><span class="si">!r}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">matched</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">prefix</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">field_name</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">_CHAPTER_NOTE_BULLETS</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">line</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">startswith</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">prefix</span><span class="p">):</span>
                <span class="n">value</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">line</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">prefix</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">:]</span>
                <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">field_name</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;decisions_added&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;open_issues&quot;</span><span class="p">):</span>
                    <span class="nb">getattr</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">current</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">field_name</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">value</span><span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
                    <span class="nb">setattr</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">current</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">field_name</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">value</span><span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="n">matched</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">True</span>
                <span class="k">break</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">matched</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="ne">ValueError</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;unknown chapter note line for </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">current</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">line</span><span class="si">!r}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">chapters</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="chapter_contexts_equivalent">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.context.chapter_contexts_equivalent">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">chapter_contexts_equivalent</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">left</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">ChapterContext</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">right</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">ChapterContext</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">bool</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Return True when two chapter notes have the same durable content.</span>

<span class="sd">    ``chunk_ids`` is ignored because rendered Markdown does not include chunk</span>
<span class="sd">    ids; they are hydrated from ``chapter-map.json`` on import or upsert.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">left</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_id</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">right</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_id</span>
        <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">left</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">title</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">right</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">title</span>
        <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">left</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_summary</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">right</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_summary</span>
        <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">left</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">translation_summary</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">right</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">translation_summary</span>
        <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">left</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">decisions_added</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">right</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">decisions_added</span>
        <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">left</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">open_issues</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">right</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">open_issues</span>
    <span class="p">)</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="ContextMarkdownDrift">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.context.ContextMarkdownDrift">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">class</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nc">ContextMarkdownDrift</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">BaseModel</span><span class="p">):</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Drift between rendered ``context.md`` chapter notes and ``context.json``.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="n">model_config</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ConfigDict</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">extra</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;forbid&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">missing_in_json</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default_factory</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">conflicting</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default_factory</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">parse_errors</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default_factory</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="nd">@property</span>
    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">unsafe_to_overwrite</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">bool</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;True when overwriting ``context.md`` would discard Markdown-only notes.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="nb">bool</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">missing_in_json</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">conflicting</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">parse_errors</span><span class="p">)</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="analyze_context_markdown_drift">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.context.analyze_context_markdown_drift">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">analyze_context_markdown_drift</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">project</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">context</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">TranslationContext</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">ContextMarkdownDrift</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Compare existing ``context.md`` chapter notes with ``context.json``.</span>

<span class="sd">    If ``context.md`` is missing, no drift is reported. Parser failures populate</span>
<span class="sd">    ``parse_errors`` and make the overwrite unsafe.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">md_path</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">context_markdown_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">md_path</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">is_file</span><span class="p">():</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">ContextMarkdownDrift</span><span class="p">()</span>
    <span class="n">markdown</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_read_text_normalized</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">md_path</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">try</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">parsed</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">parse_context_markdown_chapter_notes</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">markdown</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">except</span> <span class="ne">ValueError</span> <span class="k">as</span> <span class="n">exc</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">ContextMarkdownDrift</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">parse_errors</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">exc</span><span class="p">)])</span>
    <span class="n">json_by_id</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{</span><span class="n">ch</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">ch</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">ch</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">context</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_contexts</span><span class="p">}</span>
    <span class="n">missing</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="n">conflicting</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">note</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">parsed</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">existing</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">json_by_id</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">note</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_id</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">existing</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">missing</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">note</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_id</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">elif</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">chapter_contexts_equivalent</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">note</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">existing</span><span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="n">conflicting</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">note</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_id</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">ContextMarkdownDrift</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">missing_in_json</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">missing</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">conflicting</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">conflicting</span><span class="p">)</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="hydrate_chapter_contexts_from_chapter_map">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.context.hydrate_chapter_contexts_from_chapter_map">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">hydrate_chapter_contexts_from_chapter_map</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">project</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">chapters</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">ChapterContext</span><span class="p">]</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Fill ``title`` and ``chunk_ids`` from ``chapter-map.json`` where absent.</span>

<span class="sd">    Existing non-empty titles or chunk ids are never overwritten.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.chapters</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">load_chapter_map</span>

    <span class="n">chapter_map</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">load_chapter_map</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">chapter_map</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span>
    <span class="n">by_id</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{</span><span class="n">ch</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">ch</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">ch</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">chapter_map</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapters</span><span class="p">}</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">note</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">chapters</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">mapped</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">by_id</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">note</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_id</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">mapped</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">note</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">title</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">mapped</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">title</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">note</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">title</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">mapped</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">title</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">note</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunk_ids</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">mapped</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunk_ids</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">note</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunk_ids</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mapped</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunk_ids</span><span class="p">)</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="merge_chapter_contexts">
