<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.context.merge_chapter_contexts">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">merge_chapter_contexts</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">context</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">TranslationContext</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">imported</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">ChapterContext</span><span class="p">],</span>
    <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">replace_existing</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">append_existing_lists</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Merge imported chapter notes into ``context`` and return changed ids.</span>

<span class="sd">    Default behavior adds notes whose chapter ids are absent, treats</span>
<span class="sd">    equivalent notes as no-ops, and refuses differing existing notes. Pass</span>
<span class="sd">    ``replace_existing`` to replace durable fields (preserving or hydrating</span>
<span class="sd">    ``chunk_ids``), or ``append_existing_lists`` to keep existing summaries</span>
<span class="sd">    unless empty and append non-duplicate decisions and open issues in order.</span>
<span class="sd">    The two modes are mutually exclusive.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">replace_existing</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">append_existing_lists</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="ne">ValueError</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;replace_existing and append_existing_lists are mutually exclusive&quot;</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">existing_by_id</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{</span><span class="n">ch</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">ch</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">ch</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">context</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_contexts</span><span class="p">}</span>
    <span class="n">changed</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">note</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">imported</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">current</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">existing_by_id</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">note</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_id</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">current</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">context</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_contexts</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">note</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">existing_by_id</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">note</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_id</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">note</span>
            <span class="n">changed</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">note</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_id</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">chapter_contexts_equivalent</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">note</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">current</span><span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">replace_existing</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">chunk_ids</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">current</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunk_ids</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">note</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunk_ids</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">current</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">title</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">note</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">title</span>
            <span class="n">current</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_summary</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">note</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_summary</span>
            <span class="n">current</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">translation_summary</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">note</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">translation_summary</span>
            <span class="n">current</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">decisions_added</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">note</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">decisions_added</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">current</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">open_issues</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">note</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">open_issues</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">current</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunk_ids</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">chunk_ids</span>
            <span class="n">changed</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">note</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_id</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">elif</span> <span class="n">append_existing_lists</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">modified</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">current</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">title</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">note</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">title</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">current</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">title</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">note</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">title</span>
                <span class="n">modified</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">True</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">current</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_summary</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">note</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_summary</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">current</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_summary</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">note</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_summary</span>
                <span class="n">modified</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">True</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">current</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">translation_summary</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">note</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">translation_summary</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">current</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">translation_summary</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">note</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">translation_summary</span>
                <span class="n">modified</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">True</span>
            <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">dec</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">note</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">decisions_added</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">dec</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">current</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">decisions_added</span><span class="p">:</span>
                    <span class="n">current</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">decisions_added</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">dec</span><span class="p">)</span>
                    <span class="n">modified</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">True</span>
            <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">issue</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">note</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">open_issues</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">issue</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">current</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">open_issues</span><span class="p">:</span>
                    <span class="n">current</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">open_issues</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">issue</span><span class="p">)</span>
                    <span class="n">modified</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">True</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">modified</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">changed</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">note</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_id</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="ne">ValueError</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;chapter </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">note</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> differs from context.json; &quot;</span>
                <span class="s2">&quot;pass --replace-existing or --append-existing-lists&quot;</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">changed</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="upsert_chapter_context">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.context.upsert_chapter_context">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">upsert_chapter_context</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">context</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">TranslationContext</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">note</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">ChapterContext</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">replace_decisions</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">replace_open_issues</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">replace_all</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Create or update one chapter note.</span>

<span class="sd">    Title and summaries update only when provided. Decisions and open issues</span>
<span class="sd">    append by default (avoiding exact duplicates) and replace only when the</span>
<span class="sd">    matching replace flag is true.</span>

<span class="sd">    When ``replace_all`` is true, the stored note is set exactly to the</span>
<span class="sd">    supplied values (empty strings and empty lists are allowed).</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">existing</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">ChapterContext</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">ch</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">context</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_contexts</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">ch</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_id</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">note</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_id</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">existing</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ch</span>
            <span class="k">break</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">existing</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">context</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_contexts</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">note</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">return</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">replace_all</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">existing</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">title</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">note</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">title</span>
        <span class="n">existing</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_summary</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">note</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_summary</span>
        <span class="n">existing</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">translation_summary</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">note</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">translation_summary</span>
        <span class="n">existing</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">decisions_added</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">note</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">decisions_added</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">existing</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">open_issues</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">note</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">open_issues</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">existing</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunk_ids</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">existing</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunk_ids</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">note</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunk_ids</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">return</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">note</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">title</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">existing</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">title</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">note</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">title</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">note</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_summary</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">existing</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_summary</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">note</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_summary</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">note</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">translation_summary</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">existing</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">translation_summary</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">note</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">translation_summary</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">replace_decisions</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">existing</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">decisions_added</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">note</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">decisions_added</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">dec</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">note</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">decisions_added</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">dec</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">existing</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">decisions_added</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">existing</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">decisions_added</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">dec</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">replace_open_issues</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">existing</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">open_issues</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">note</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">open_issues</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">issue</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">note</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">open_issues</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">issue</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">existing</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">open_issues</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">existing</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">open_issues</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">issue</span><span class="p">)</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="ensure_context_markdown_safe_to_overwrite">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.context.ensure_context_markdown_safe_to_overwrite">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">ensure_context_markdown_safe_to_overwrite</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">project</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">context</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">TranslationContext</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">allow_discard_md_only</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Raise ``ValueError`` if writing ``context.md`` would discard notes.</span>

<span class="sd">    Runs drift analysis against the existing ``context.md``. Pass</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;allow_discard_md_only=True`` for commands whose purpose is to overwrite</span>
<span class="sd">    Markdown despite unsafe drift.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">drift</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">analyze_context_markdown_drift</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">context</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">drift</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">unsafe_to_overwrite</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">allow_discard_md_only</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span>
    <span class="n">parts</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">drift</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">missing_in_json</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">parts</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;missing_in_json: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="s1">&#39;, &#39;</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">join</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">drift</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">missing_in_json</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">drift</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">conflicting</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">parts</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;conflicting: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="s1">&#39;, &#39;</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">join</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">drift</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">conflicting</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">drift</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">parse_errors</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">parts</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;parse_errors: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="s1">&#39;; &#39;</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">join</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">drift</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">parse_errors</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="ne">ValueError</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;context.md contains chapter notes that are not safely represented &quot;</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;in context.json. &quot;</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="s2">&quot;; &quot;</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">join</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">parts</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="p">)</span></div>

</pre></div>
